manifest_notes: Helm metric reporter bug for OTEL endpoint configuration.

issue.title: [helm/metric-reporter] Problem with `METRIC_CLIENT=otel` Invalid endpoint
issue.body:
### Platform Version

0.50.48

### What step the error happened?

Upgrading the Platform or Helm Chart

### Revelant information

When i specify METRIC_CLIENT=otel, airbyte doesn't work. Also i use docker compose and i see the airbyte server container cannot start

### Relevant log output


comments.body:
compose example 
```yaml
  otel-collector:
    image: otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib
    volumes:
      - ./otel/otel-collector-config.yaml:/etc/otelcol-contrib/config.yaml
    networks:
      - airbyte_internal
    ports:
      - 8888:8888 # Prometheus metrics exposed by the collector
      - 8889:8889 # Prometheus exporter metrics
  metric-reporter:
    image: airbyte/metrics-reporter:${VERSION}
    container_name: metric-reporter
    networks:
      - airbyte_internal
    environment:
      - DATABASE_PASSWORD=${DATABASE_PASSWORD}
      - DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL}
      - DATABASE_USER=${DATABASE_USER}
      - METRIC_CLIENT=${METRIC_CLIENT}
      - OTEL_COLLECTOR_ENDPOINT=${OTEL_COLLECTOR_ENDPOINT}
```

```env
### MONITORING FLAGS ###
PUBLISH_METRICS=true
# Accepted values are datadog and otel (open telemetry)
METRIC_CLIENT=otel

OTEL_COLLECTOR_ENDPOINT="http://otel-collector:4317"
```

At Airbyte, we seek to be clear about the project priorities and roadmap.  This issue has not had any activity for 180 days, suggesting that it's not as critical as others.  It's possible it has already been fixed. It is being marked as stale and will be closed in 20 days if there is no activity. To keep it open, please comment to let us know why it is important to you and if it is still reproducible on recent versions of Airbyte.
This issue was closed because it has been inactive for 20 days since being marked as stale.
